abilities.description: The next X damage that a source of your choice would deal to you and/or creatures you control this turn is dealt to any target instead.

effect.description: The next X damage that a source of your choice would deal to you and/or creatures you control this turn is dealt to any target instead.
effect.name: ChooseSource

statics.description: You may exile a white card with mana value X from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
